title: Cheesecake's Vanilla+
body:
![title](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CheesecakeTM/Cheesecake/refs/tags/v1.2.0/title.png)

--- ### 💡 Description This pack is a vanilla+ kitchen-sink modpack made for me and my friends. Is mostly focused on adventure and exploration, but everyone can play the way they like. ### Can you add {insert mod}? I will not. ALTHOUGH **you are free to do what you will**. ### No Quests? No, there are no quests. **I don’t plan on adding them for now**, but you’ll never know. ### Can I use my favourite texturepack? Will it work? It most likely will. There are all of the Optifine features here.
⁉️ Diclaimer _*This was made for me and my friends, so it will not be *extremly* maintained.*_\ ***_None of this mods are made by me. For support or questions about certain mods go to the respective page and show some love to the original cretor(s)._***\ _NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT_
